====Pokémon====
This listing is of Marlon's known {{OBP|Pokémon|species}} in {{aniseries|PTS}}:

|trainer=Marlon
|width=68

|type1=Water
|img=Marlon Wailord.png
|epnum=BW094
|epname=The Road to Humilau!
<!--|vajp=

|desc={{p|Wailord}} was used to transport Marlon, {{Ash}}, and {{un|Cameron}} to the [[Humilau Gym]].

None of Wailord's moves are known.}}

{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Marlon
|pkmn=Jellicent
|gender=male
|type1=Water
|type2=Ghost
|img=Marlon Jellicent.png
|epnum=BW094
|epname=The Road to Humilau!
|vajp=Kiyotaka Furushima
|vaen=Billy Bob Thompson
|desc={{p|Jellicent}} was the first Pokémon that Marlon used against {{un|Cameron}} in their [[Gym]] {{pkmn|battle}}. He battled Cameron's {{p|Ferrothorn}}, and while he was defeated by Ferrothorn's {{m|Thunderbolt}}, his [[Ability]] was activated, thereby disabling the [[move]].

Jellicent's only known move is {{m|Shadow Ball}} and his Ability is {{a|Cursed Body}}.}}

{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Marlon
|pkmn=Mantine
|type1=Water
|type2=Flying
|img=Marlon Mantine.png
|epnum=BW094
|epname=The Road to Humilau!
|vajp=Unshō Ishizuka
|vaen=Unshō Ishizuka
|desc={{p|Mantine}} is Marlon's ace Pokémon. It was the second Pokémon that Marlon used against {{un|Cameron}} in their Gym battle. It quickly knocked out {{p|Ferrothorn}} with a combination of Wing Attack, Bullet Seed, and Psybeam. Afterwards, Mantine faced off against Cameron's female {{p|Samurott}} and was knocked out without landing a single attack on her.

Mantine's known moves are {{m|Wing Attack}}, {{m|Bullet Seed}}, and {{m|Psybeam}}.}}
